calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerks K. Shaw/M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Barbara Kaplan as attorney-in-fact for plaintiff Anne Kaplan is not present.
Christine Tour-Sarkissian representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Kim Lamont is present.
Gerald Hall representing the defendant through limited scope.

Attorney Tour-Sarkissian appears without her client, claiming her client to be too elderly to appear but is on telephone standy-by. After a private conference with counsel, Commissioner Kaplan has allowed the settlement conference to take place.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
